testsuite.name: features.nodoInviaRPT.nodoInviaRPT_withStamp.User pays a single payment with stamp via nodoInviaRPT

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaRPT.nodoInviaRPT_withStamp.User pays a single payment with stamp via nodoInviaRPT
testcase.name: User pays a single payment with no simple transfer and one stamp

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaRPT.nodoInviaRPT_withStamp.User pays a single payment with stamp via nodoInviaRPT
testcase.name: User pays a single payment with one simple transfer and one stamp

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaRPT.nodoInviaRPT_withStamp.User pays a single payment with stamp via nodoInviaRPT
testcase.name: User pays a single payment with two simple transfer and one stamp

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaRPT.nodoInviaRPT_withStamp.User pays a single payment with stamp via nodoInviaRPT
testcase.name: User pays a single payment with two simple transfer and two stamp

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaRPT.nodoInviaRPT_withStamp.User pays a single payment with stamp via nodoInviaRPT
testcase.name: User pays a single payment as PO type with no simple transfer and one stamp

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaRPT.nodoInviaRPT_withStamp.User pays a single payment with stamp via nodoInviaRPT
testcase.name: User pays a single payment as PO type with one simple transfer and one stamp, but fails the semantic validation
